series_metadata.series_title: Unemployment Compensation Review Commission Personnel File
series_metadata.series_description: Record of employment history. May contain applications; letters of appointment; performance evaluations; personnel actions; signed separation letters; employee consents/acknowledgments; and correspondence pertaining to employee.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in MIS on optical disk for 50 years, then erase provided audits are completed and released, all discrepancies are resolved, and there is no legal action pending. ; Paper: Retain 30 days after hard copy is prepped, scanned and indexed (imaged) and quality control is completed, then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
